# agentops_knowledge_base (Resource)

A knowledge base that stores documents made searchable by agents.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "agentops_knowledge_base" "runbooks" {
  name        = "runbooks"
  description = "Operational runbooks indexed for agents"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable knowledge base name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form description.
- `labels` (Map of String) Arbitrary key/value labels attached to the knowledge base.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `doc_count` (Number) Number of documents stored in the knowledge base.
- `id` (String) Knowledge base identifier.
- `indexed_count` (Number) Number of documents that have been indexed.
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp.
